text:
Gon × Killua × Deadly Chase (ゴン×キルア×命がけの尾行, Gon × Kirua × Inochi ga ke no Bikō) is the 58 th episode of the original Hunter × Hunter anime. It first aired on February 24 th , 2001.

Overview

Gon, Killua and Leorio arrive where Nobunaga and Machi are to spy on them. Leorio, unable to use Zetsu to hide his aura, returns home, while Gon and Killua follow them, but get captured. Light Nostrade arrives, giving orders to Neon, Kurapika and the others. The Mafia hires professional assassins, including Silva and Zeno from the Zoldyck Family.

Synopsis

The Nostrade bodyguards, along with Eliza, watch over Neon while awaiting Light's arrival. Kurapika returns to the hotel, and the other bodyguards are shocked and worried over his appearance; he is haggard and bloody, with torn clothes. He goes to his room and is so exhausted that he falls to the floor. Melody, worried about him, hesitates to enter his room before deciding against it. Kurapika stays in his room, alone, saying an oath to his clan under his breath.

Machi and Nobunaga, having been sent out as scouts to look for Uvogin, sit at a table outside in the city. They argue over whether Uvogin is dead, although both are left worried and uncertain. The woman and man who tipped off Leorio and his friends about the sighting of the two Spiders sit across from Machi and Nobunaga at another table, showing a live video of the Spiders to Leorio, Killua, and Gon. The trio wire the payment to the couple, who take off once they are no longer needed. 

The trio, sitting not too far away, debate whether or not they stand a chance against the two Spiders. Killua is certain that the trio have no chance of winning and is also certain that the two Spiders know they are being watched. Sure enough, Nobunaga and Machi discuss the people watching them, certain they are being spied on but uncertain of by whom. They argue about what they'll do with Kurapika if it turns out to be him, heated enough that the trio can feel the tension between them from where they are sitting. Nobunaga and Machi decide to flip a coin to determine whether they will bring Kurapika in dead or alive to Chrollo.

Back at the hotel, Light arrives and thanks the bodyguards for keeping his daughter safe. Light says that Neon will be going home, since there is no point in her being there with the auction canceled, and Neon begrudgingly agrees and goes to pack her things. Light instructs Melody and Basho to escort Neon home. Once Neon is out of the room, Light discusses the plans for the reopening auction that night with the bodyguards, informing them that the Ten Dons plan to reacquire the stolen auction goods, which are likely in the hands of the Phantom Troupe now that all of the Shadow Beasts have been killed. 

Light also informs them that the Ten Dons have hired professionals to take care of the Phantom Troupe; Zeno and Silva arrive in Yorknew City. Light asks Kurapika to join the team of assassins in taking down the Phantom Troupe due to his abilities specifically being for targeting Spiders.

Outside the city, Machi and Nobunaga get up and leave their table. Killua tells Gon that they will follow the two Spiders since they can conceal themselves with Zetsu. Leorio, unable to use Zetsu, is instructed by Killua to go check in with Zepile. Gon and Killua split up to tail Machi and Nobunaga, communicating with each other via cellphone. Killua watches the two Spiders closely and doesn't believe that they know he and Gon are following them. Machi and Nobunaga talk about how they are likely being followed, but can't tell if it's true. Machi and Nobunaga head into the deserted part of the city, and Killua is unsure whether it is a trap or not; he decides to continue following them anyways.

Machi and Nobunaga stand out in the open, unable to agree on who they believe is following them or if they are still being followed. Gon and Killua, who are hiding in different locations in the area, talk over their phones and decide to wait and see what the two Spiders are going to do. Nobunaga gets a call on his cell from one of the other Spiders, and during his conversation, Pakunoda and Phinks find Gon and Killua, who try and make a run for it. Killua gets cornered by Nobunaga and Phinks, who informed both Killua and Nobunaga that the rest of the Spiders were actually tracking Gon and Killua the whole time. Gon gets cornered by Machi and Pakunoda.
